result:
**Goal: Add a heatmap visualization mode that shows cumulative cell activity over time.**

This would overlay a color gradient on the grid showing how frequently each cell has been alive across all observed generations — cells that are active often glow hot (red/white), rarely-active cells are cool (blue/dim), and never-active cells stay dark. Toggle it with `H`. This complements the existing cell-aging colors by giving a "big picture" view of where activity concentrates, making it easy to spot oscillator regions, glider paths, and dead zones at a glance.
